arts.ttl: 'He is a good example' - Ruben Amorim picks out the almost undroppable Manchester United player
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte's form has improved in the last month and Ruben Amorim praised him at his press conference.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends disgruntled Arsenal fans pointed message before Man Utd match
arts.sum: ARSENAL vs MANCHESTER UNITED: Mikel Arteta believes the Gunners are doing better than they were at this stage of last season and for that reason, he insists everybody around the club must remain positive despite the midweek defeat to Newcastle

arts.ttl: Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim studying Sir Alex Ferguson footage ahead of FA Cup clash vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to face Arsenal in the third round of the FA Cup on Sunday and Red Devils boss Ruben Amorim is hoping his side will go on to lift the trophy in May

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford must decide his future after Serie A side make offer for the Man Utd star
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford claims he is ready for a "new challenge" after falling out with Ruben Amorim at Manchester United and has received several offers from abroad

arts.ttl: FA Cup run may have to ignite Arsenal’s season in absence of big-money signings | Ed Aarons
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta, whose side host Manchester United, is unlikely to be able to bolster his attack this month “Gentlemen whose sole ability to build up a good side depends on the payment of heavy and exhorbitant [sic] transfer fees need not apply.” This summer marks the 100th anniversary of the legendary Herbert Chapman’s appointment by Arsenal after the chairman, Sir Henry Norris, posted an advertisement in the Athletic News as they searched for a new manager. Times may have changed but the message must sound very familiar to Mikel Arteta. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd's Class of 92 sent stark reminder as Man City show their dominance
arts.sum: Manchester United's Class of 92 often had it their own way during their playing careers, but with some in attendance - and other notable in their absence - they watched Salford get thrashed

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal will wear all-white kit for huge Man Utd FA Cup clash
arts.sum: The unique design is part of Arsenal's No More Red initiative, a joint venture launched alongside adidas to raise awareness of the dangers of knife crime which exist in London and beyond. That style has been in place across the subsequent century, but on Sunday afternoon, Arsenal will host Manchester United in the third round of FA Cup draped entirely in white - without a drop of red in sight.

arts.ttl: Teenage defender Leon set for Man Utd medical
arts.sum: Teenage Paraguayan defender Diego Leon is flying to England to complete a medical for a move to Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Official | Monaco sign former Arsenal forward Mika Biereth from Sturm Graz
arts.sum: AS Monaco have officially announced the signing of Mika Biereth (21) from Austrian outfit SK Sturm Graz. The Danish U21 who was born in London developed in the Arsenal academy…

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Arsenal
arts.sum: The world expected a Liverpool trouncing at Anfield last Sunday, but a new and improved Red Devils gave as good as they got on Merseyside and were good value for their 2-2 draw . United doubtlessly benefitted from the gap between games, and Amorim has enjoyed the first full week off since the November international break heading into Sunday's FA Cup third-round tie at Arsenal.
